description_long: This wardrobe features a tall, rectangular structure with a muted beige exterior and a minimalist design. The front side includes a large vertical door panel, a tall black vertical accent or possible mirror, and a set of integrated drawers and open shelving on the left. The right section is dominated by a full-height door, likely concealing a spacious storage compartment. The surfaces are flat and smooth, with no visible handles, suggesting a push-to-open mechanism or recessed grips. The overall appearance is modern and functional, suitable for urban interiors or semi-public spaces such as lobbies or shared living areas.
description: A tall, beige modern wardrobe with a large door, black accent panel, and integrated drawers and shelves, featuring a smooth, handle-less design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main door, black vertical accent, and integrated drawers and shelves on the left.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the wardrobe's depth and the solid, unadorned side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, featureless back panel with no visible openings or details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wardrobe's depth and the open shelving area on the left.
